s Sender This x10 actor will broadcast appliance-module commands to the X10 network. An appliance module is an X10 device that can turn an appliance on and off. This is a specialized X10 broadcaster actor that will only transmit the following comm

actor that will only transmit the following commands: ON : Turn on an appliance module. OFF : Turn off an appliance module. Since: Ptolemy II 4.0 Version: $Id: ApplianceController.java,v 1.8 2004/04/13 03:10:25 cxh Exp $ Author: Colin Cochran (cont
